mapper.select: SELECT tracK_id FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_track_list WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = (SELECT rcmmd_artist_id FROM tb_rcmmd_artist WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = #{rcmmdArtistId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}) ORDER BY disp_sn ASC

SELECT tracK_id FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list WHERE rcmmd_similar_track_id = (SELECT rcmmd_similar_track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track WHERE rcmmd_similar_track_id = #{rcmmdTrackId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}) ORDER BY disp_sn ASC

SELECT tracK_id FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_list WHERE rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = (SELECT rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track WHERE rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = #{rcmmdGenreId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}) ORDER BY disp_sn ASC

SELECT tracK_id FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu_list WHERE rcmmd_mforu_id = (SELECT rcmmd_mforu_id FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu WHERE rcmmd_mforu_id = #{rcmmdMforuId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}) ORDER BY disp_sn ASC
